questions.explanation: An oasis is a fertile area in a desert where water is available, allowing plants to grow.

questions.text: Camels store water in their humps.
questions.explanation: Camels store fat in their humps, not water. They can survive long periods without water by using this fat.

questions.correctAnswer: They have deep roots, thick stems to store water, and small or no leaves.
questions.explanation: Desert plants like cactus have adapted to survive with minimal water through special features.

questions.text: The largest hot desert in the world is the ________.
questions.explanation: The Sahara Desert in Africa is the largest hot desert in the world.
